notes: Interface redesign, per-page legend control in PDF export, and layer management upgrades.

features: New top menu bar (File / Edit / Export / View / Help) with a standalone Quit button
Export dialog with a live PDF preview and per-page legend placement (any corner, vertical or horizontal)
Layers: multi-select, minimize/expand, and move up/down; the layer toolbar stays pinned while scrolling
Report an issue now opens a pre-filled GitHub ticket
fixes: Slimmer annotated-PDF legend box so it covers less of the drawing
